posts.author: Mazeflare
posts.body: is it the first female KSW title fight ever? Wow, Czyżewska making waves with a pretty favorable match-up.I remember this Sara girl getting choked out by Misteli in Oktagon. * Edited at 03.08.2026, 12:56 PM ET *

posts.author: emczy04
posts.body: Predictions: 9 of 9 Pending | Tied for 1st with 181 others @Mazeflare its first female KSW title fight in this weight category. However there were 2 female KSW champions before - Ariane Lipski on flyweight and Karolina Kowalkiewicz on strawweight
